0 I 5

6 OR 72
7 OR 03

Applying to 11110101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 5 = 1
1 I 6 = 0
2 I 7 = 1
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 OR 72 = OR(I 7,I 2) = OR(1,1) = 1
7 OR 03 = OR(I 0,I 3) = OR(1,1) = 1

\boxed{10100011}
